clusters.justification: These terms share macroscopic co-activation within the salience and limbic systems, reflecting the high-level functional axis of generating, processing, and regulating physiological arousal and emotional valence.

Mapping heavily onto the mesolimbic and ventromedial prefrontal circuitry, these terms represent the overarching cognitive domain of computing subjective value, anticipating reward, and driving goal-directed decision making.

Driven by co-activation within the default mode network, this cluster captures the macroscopic domain of producing abstract representations of agents, seamlessly binding self-referential memory with the processing of others' minds and social cues.
